triggers.name: notification_type_set_updated_at
triggers.body: CREATE TRIGGER notification_type_set_updated_at BEFORE UPDATE ON mrsmith.notification_type FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION mrsmith.set_runtime_config_updated_at()

triggers.name: runtime_config_set_updated_at
triggers.body: CREATE TRIGGER runtime_config_set_updated_at BEFORE UPDATE ON mrsmith.runtime_config FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION mrsmith.set_runtime_config_updated_at()

functions.name: set_runtime_config_updated_at

checkConstraints.name: rdf_fattibilita_fornitori_stato_check
checkConstraints.expression: ((stato)::text = ANY (ARRAY[('bozza'::character varying)::text, ('inviata'::character varying)::text, ('sollecitata'::character varying)::text, ('completata'::character varying)::text, ('annullata'::character varying)::text]))

triggers.name: trigger_aggiorna_stato_richiesta
triggers.body: CREATE TRIGGER trigger_aggiorna_stato_richiesta AFTER INSERT ON public.rdf_fattibilita_fornitori FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION public.aggiorna_stato_richiesta_dopo_fattibilita()

checkConstraints.name: check_stato
checkConstraints.expression: ((stato)::text = ANY ((ARRAY['nuova'::character varying, 'in corso'::character varying, 'completata'::character varying, 'annullata'::character varying])::text[]))

functions.name: aggiorna_stato_richiesta_dopo_fattibilita
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.aggiorna_stato_richiesta_dopo_fattibilita()
 RETURNS trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN
    -- Aggiorna lo stato della richiesta da 'nuova' a 'in corso'
    UPDATE rdf_richieste 
    SET stato = 'in corso'
    WHERE id = NEW.richiesta_id 
    AND stato = 'nuova';
    
    RETURN NEW;
END;
$function$

checkConstraints.name: maintenance_window_check1
checkConstraints.expression: ((actual_start_at IS NULL) OR (actual_end_at IS NULL) OR (actual_end_at > actual_start_at))

checkConstraints.name: site_scope_consistency
checkConstraints.expression: (((scope = 'global'::text) AND (owner_maintenance_id IS NULL)) OR ((scope = 'scoped'::text) AND (owner_maintenance_id IS NOT NULL)))

views.name: v_current_window
views.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT ON (maintenance_id) maintenance_id,
    maintenance_window_id,
    seq_no,
    window_status,
    scheduled_start_at,
    scheduled_end_at,
    expected_downtime_minutes
   FROM maintenance.maintenance_window mw
  ORDER BY maintenance_id, seq_no DESC;
